inputs.label: Setpoint (SP)
inputs.businessContext: Desired target value for the controlled variable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired target value for the controlled variable.
businessContext_i18n.tr: m² metal yüzey başına gereken durulama suyu hacmi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur cible souhaitée pour la variable contrôlée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor objetivo deseado para la variable controlada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: القيمة المستهدفة المرغوبة للمتغير المتحكم به.

inputs.label: Process Variable (PV)
inputs.businessContext: Current measured value of the controlled variable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current measured value of the controlled variable.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kontrol edilen değişken için istenen hedef değer.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur mesurée actuelle de la variable contrôlée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor medido actual de la variable controlada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: القيمة المقاسة الحالية للمتغير المتحكم به.

inputs.label: Proportional Gain (Kp)
inputs.businessContext: Proportional tuning parameter; higher Kp increases control action proportional to error.

businessContext_i18n.en: Proportional tuning parameter; higher Kp increases control action proportional to error.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kontrol edilen değişkenin mevcut ölçülen değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Proportionaler Verstärkungsfaktor; höheres Kp verstärkt die Stellgröße proportional zum Fehler.
businessContext_i18n.es: Parámetro de sintonía proporcional; un Kp mayor aumenta la acción de control proporcional al error.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل الضبط التناسبي؛ زيادة Kp تزيد من إجراء التحكم بما يتناسب مع الخطأ.

inputs.label: Integral Gain (Ki)
inputs.businessContext: Integral tuning parameter; corrects steady‑state error by accumulating past errors.

businessContext_i18n.en: Integral tuning parameter; corrects steady‑state error by accumulating past errors.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Oransal ayar parametresi; yüksek Kp, hatayla orantılı kontrol eylemini artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Integraler Verstärkungsfaktor; korrigiert stationäre Fehler durch Aufsummieren vergangener Fehler.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Paramètre d'action intégrale ; corrige l'erreur résiduelle en accumulant les erreurs passées.
businessContext_i18n.es: Parámetro de sintonía integral; corrige el error en estado estacionario acumulando errores pasados.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل الضبط التكاملي؛ يصحح الخطأ في الحالة المستقرة عن طريق تجميع الأخطاء السابقة.

inputs.label: Derivative Gain (Kd)
inputs.businessContext: Derivative tuning parameter; anticipates future error based on rate of change.

businessContext_i18n.en: Derivative tuning parameter; anticipates future error based on rate of change.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İntegral ayar parametresi; geçmiş hataları biriktirerek kalıcı hatayı düzeltir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Differenzialer Verstärkungsfaktor; antizipiert zukünftige Fehler basierend auf der Änderungsrate.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Paramètre d'action dérivée ; anticipe l'erreur future en fonction du taux de variation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Parámetro de sintonía derivativa; anticipa el error futuro basado en la tasa de cambio.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل الضبط التفاضلي؛ يتنبأ بالخطأ المستقبلي بناءً على معدل التغيير.

inputs.label: Time Step (Δt)
inputs.businessContext: Sampling interval or control loop period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sampling interval or control loop period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Türev ayar parametresi; değişim hızına dayanarak gelecekteki hatayı tahmin eder.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Intervalle d'échantillonnage ou période de boucle de régulation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Intervalo de muestreo o período del bucle de control.
businessContext_i18n.ar: فترة أخذ العينات أو دورة حلقة التحكم.

inputs.label: Previous Error
inputs.businessContext: Error from the previous sampling instant (e(k-1)).

businessContext_i18n.en: Error from the previous sampling instant (e(k-1)).
businessContext_i18n.es: Error del instante de muestreo anterior (e(k-1)).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الخطأ من لحظة أخذ العينات السابقة (e(k-1)).

inputs.label: Integral Accumulator
inputs.businessContext: Accumulated integral term up to the previous step (Σ e·Δt).

businessContext_i18n.en: Accumulated integral term up to the previous step (Σ e·Δt).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir önceki adıma kadar birikmiş integral terimi (Σ e·Δt).
businessContext_i18n.de: Aufsummierter Integralterm bis zum vorherigen Schritt (Σ e·Δt).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Terme intégral accumulé jusqu'à l'étape précédente (Σ e·Δt).
businessContext_i18n.es: Término integral acumulado hasta el paso anterior (Σ e·Δt).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحد التكاملي المتراكم حتى الخطوة السابقة (Σ e·Δt).

formulas.primary: Kp*(setpoint - processVariable) + Ki*(integral + (setpoint - processVariable)*dt) + Kd*((setpoint - processVariable) - previousError)/dt

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
